home.hero_subtitle: Book a verified, background-checked cleaner for your home or office in Germany.
home.how_step1_desc: Select your service, set the date & time, and provide your address. Choose from a range of special requests.
home.how_step2_desc: Secure your booking with a one-hour deposit. The amount is deducted from your final bill.
home.how_step3_desc: Your verified cleaner arrives on schedule. After service, receive a summary and pay the balance.
home.services_subtitle: Professional cleaning tailored to your needs
home.cities_subtitle: We serve major cities across Germany
home.trust_verified_desc: All cleaners are verified and legally registered businesses.
home.trust_english_desc: Choose an English-speaking cleaner at no extra cost.
home.trust_guarantee_desc: Request a correction cleaning within 24 hours if you're not satisfied.
home.trust_support_desc: Customer support available every day of the week.
home.cta_subtitle: Book your first cleaning in under 60 seconds.

services.title: Our Cleaning Services
services.subtitle: Compare options and find the perfect cleaning service for your needs.
services.quote_based: This service requires a custom quote.

booking.title: Book Your Cleaning
booking.country_hint: Service is available in Germany only. Your full address helps us match you with the right team.
booking.support_intro: Not sure which city to pick or how to enter your address? We are happy to help.
booking.notes_placeholder: Any specific requests or access instructions...
booking.stripe_unconfigured: Payments are unavailable: set VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY in frontend/.env to your Stripe publishable key (pk_test_… or pk_live_… from the Dashboard — not the secret sk_… key). Restart the Vite dev server after changing .env.
booking.confirm_message: Your booking has been confirmed. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly.

auth.register_subtitle: Join us and book your first cleaning
auth.name: Full Name

cities.title: Cities We Serve
cities.subtitle: Professional cleaning services available in major German cities.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We connect you with trusted, professional cleaners across Germany.
about.mission_text: We believe everyone deserves a clean living space. Our platform makes it easy to find reliable, background-checked cleaning professionals — especially for the international community in Germany.
about.value_trust_desc: Every cleaner is background-checked and legally registered. No hidden fees, no surprises.
about.value_quality_desc: We maintain high standards through customer reviews and our satisfaction guarantee program.
about.value_access_desc: English-speaking cleaners and support available at no extra cost, making life easier for internationals.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question or need a custom quote? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.office_desc: Need a custom cleaning plan for your office? Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.settings_hint: Branding, legal name, contact details, and booking support copy shown to customers.
admin.backup_hint: Downloads a backup of your configured database to your computer (browser download folder). SQLite: SQL dump if the sqlite3 CLI is available, otherwise a copy of the .sqlite file. MySQL / MariaDB: needs mysqldump on the server PATH. PostgreSQL: needs pg_dump on the server PATH. For hosted production servers without these tools, use your provider’s backup or SSH.
admin.backup_started: Backup download started. Check your browser’s downloads.
admin.manage_services_subtitle: Main cleaning packages shown on your site and in the booking flow: names, descriptions, hourly rate, URL slug, and quote-only services.
admin.field_slug_hint: Used in public links (e.g. /services/your-slug). Leave blank to generate from the English name.
admin.field_slug_hint_edit: Changing the slug updates public URLs. Old links will no longer work.
admin.confirm_delete_service: Delete this service? All extras for this service will be removed. Services with existing bookings cannot be deleted.
admin.confirm_move_trash_service: Move this service to trash? You can restore it from Trash. Services with existing bookings cannot be removed.
admin.no_services: No services yet. Add one to get started.
admin.trash_hint: Restore items or delete them permanently. Active lists hide trashed records.
admin.trash_empty: Nothing in trash for this category.
admin.confirm_move_trash: Move this item to trash? You can restore it later from Trash.
admin.confirm_delete_forever: Permanently delete this item? This cannot be undone.
admin.switch_city: Allow new bookings in this city
admin.switch_cleaner: Allow assigning this cleaner to new jobs
admin.switch_service: Show this service on the website and in booking
admin.service_live_hint: Visible on the public site and in the booking flow.
admin.service_paused_hint: Hidden from the public site and booking—customers cannot choose it.
admin.cities_subtitle: Control which cities appear in the booking flow and on your public site.
admin.city_live_hint: Visible in booking — customers can select this city.
admin.city_paused_hint: Paused — hidden from new bookings until re-enabled.
admin.cleaners_subtitle: Manage profiles, availability for assignments, and service areas.
admin.cleaner_paused_hint: Paused — not offered when assigning bookings.
admin.extras_subtitle: Add-ons shown in the booking flow for each service (names, descriptions, price, equipment flag).
admin.confirm_delete_extra: Delete this extra? It will disappear from new bookings. You cannot delete an extra that is already linked to existing bookings.
admin.no_extras: No extras yet. Add one for a service.
admin.manage_main_services_link: Add or edit main services (Basic Cleaning, Deep Cleaning, etc.) →
admin.testimonials_subtitle: Customer quotes shown on the home page (order, active flag, soft-delete to trash).
admin.extra_live_hint: Shown in the booking extras step for this service.
admin.extra_paused_hint: Hidden from customers in booking — keep for later or attach to drafts.
admin.switch_extra: Offer this extra to customers in booking
admin.no_testimonials: No testimonials yet. Add one to show on the home page.
admin.page_content_hint: Edit headlines and copy for Home, Services, Cities, About, and Contact. Use section keys like hero, mission, value (repeatable), how_step, trust_item, etc.
admin.cms_no_blocks: No blocks for this page yet. Seed defaults or add one.

common.not_found_desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

footer.description: Professional cleaning services for homes and offices across Germany.
